case_title: ELIJAH LEDBETTER VS. ABC AUTO PARTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY LEDBETTER, ELIJAH AS TO DEFENDANT ABC AUTO PARTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
